Session 1
In this training, Dean is going to change the way you look at what it takes to run a successful small group, workshop or mastermind. He is going to walk
you through one of his masterminds he did a few years ago with only 10 people in it, and show you just how easy it is to do your first mastermind. In
the next few lessons we will tackle more of the science behind these teachings, but this training is the art behind the events.
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Think through your very own 9 word email.
Understand that your first mastermind can be as simple as Dean’s LA mastermind.
Decide if you want to bring any outside guests.
Understand it's your job to help your students solve problems and get where they want to go quicker. You are the facilitator.
Help your students understand that if they try to do too many things at once they will actually do none.
Take away the thought process of “I need to perform” and replace it with “I am here to serve”
